channel.title: The Cloudflare Blog
channel.description: Get the latest news on how products at Cloudflare are built, technologies used, and join the teams helping to build a better Internet.

item.title: 【Introducing the 2026 Cloudflare Threat Report】2026 年 Cloudflare 威胁报告简介
item.description: 【 There has been a fundamental shift toward industrialized cyber threats, highlighted by a record 31.4 Tbps DDoS attack and sophisticated session token theft. Our new report examines how nation-states and criminal actors have moved beyond traditional exploits to "living off the XaaS" within legitimate enterprise logic. 】工业化网络威胁已发生根本性转变，其中最突出的是创纪录的 31.4 Tbps DDoS 攻击和复杂的会话令牌盗窃。我们的新报告探讨了民族国家和犯罪分子如何超越传统的利用方式，在合法的企业逻辑中“依靠 XaaS 生存”。

item.title: 【Evolving Cloudflare’s Threat Intelligence Platform: actionable, scalable, and ETL-less】不断发展的 Cloudflare 威胁情报平台：可操作、可扩展且无需 ETL
item.description: 【 Stop managing ETL pipelines and start threat hunting. Introducing new visualization, automation, and enrichment tools in the Cloudflare Threat Intelligence Platform to turn massive telemetry into instant security posture. 】停止管理 ETL 管道并开始威胁搜寻。在 Cloudflare 威胁情报平台中引入新的可视化、自动化和丰富工具，将大量遥测数据转化为即时安全态势。

item.title: 【How Cloudy translates complex security into human action】Cloudy 如何将复杂的安全性转化为人类行动
item.description: 【 Cloudy is our LLM-powered explanation layer built directly into Cloudflare One. Its explanations, now part of Phishnet and API CASB, can improve user decisions and SOC efficiency. 】Cloudy 是由 LLM 支持的解释层，直接内置于 Cloudflare One 中。其解释现已成为 Phishnet 和 API CASB 的一部分，可以改善用户决策和 SOC 效率。

item.title: 【From reactive to proactive: closing the phishing gap with LLMs】从被动到主动：缩小与法学硕士的网络钓鱼差距
item.description: 【 Email security is a constant arms race. Like WWII engineers reinforcing only the planes that returned, survivorship bias hides real gaps. But LLMs can help us find the invisible weaknesses. 】电子邮件安全是一场持续的军备竞赛。就像二战工程师只加固返回的飞机一样，幸存者偏差掩盖了真正的差距。但法学硕士可以帮助我们发现看不见的弱点。

item.title: 【See risk, fix risk: introducing Remediation in Cloudflare CASB】查看风险，修复风险：在 Cloudflare CASB 中引入修复
item.description: 【 Cloudflare CASB Remediation lets security teams go beyond visibility to fix risky file sharing in Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace directly from Cloudflare One, all in just a few clicks. 】Cloudflare CASB Remediation 让安全团队能够超越可见性，直接从 Cloudflare One 修复 Microsoft 365 和 Google Workspace 中存在风险的文件共享，只需点击几下即可完成所有操作。

item.title: 【Modernizing with agile SASE: a Cloudflare One blog takeover】使用敏捷 SASE 实现现代化：Cloudflare One 博客接管
item.description: 【 In 2026, agile SASE is the engine for modernization. Discover how Cloudflare One secures humans, devices, and AI agents on a single, programmable connectivity cloud. 】2026 年，敏捷 SASE 成为现代化的引擎。了解 Cloudflare One 如何在单个可编程连接云上保护人员、设备和 AI 代理的安全。

item.title: 【The truly programmable SASE platform】真正可编程的 SASE 平台
item.description: 【 As the only SASE platform with a native developer stack, we’re giving you the tools to build custom, real-time security logic and integrations directly at the edge. 】作为唯一具有本机开发人员堆栈的 SASE 平台，我们为您提供直接在边缘构建自定义实时安全逻辑和集成的工具。

item.title: 【Beyond the blank slate: how Cloudflare accelerates your Zero Trust journey】超越空白：Cloudflare 如何加速您的零信任之旅
item.description: 【 Project Helix simplifies and accelerates the onboarding process for Cloudflare One. By using automation and Terraform templates, this tool allows customers to quickly deploy a comprehensive, best-practice configuration in minutes. 】Project Helix 简化并加速了 Cloudflare One 的入职流程。通过使用自动化和 Terraform 模板，该工具允许客户在几分钟内快速部署全面的最佳实践配置。

item.title: 【Toxic combinations: when small signals add up to a security incident】有毒组合：当小信号累积起来导致安全事件时
item.description: 【 Minor misconfigurations or request anomalies often seem harmless in isolation. But when these small signals converge, they can trigger a security incident known as a toxic combination. Here’s how to spot the signs. 】轻微的配置错误或请求异常通常看起来是无害的。但当这些小信号汇聚在一起时，它们可能会引发被称为有毒组合的安全事件。以下是如何发现这些迹象。

item.title: 【We deserve a better streams API for JavaScript】我们应该有一个更好的 JavaScript 流 API
item.description: 【 The Web streams API has become ubiquitous in JavaScript runtimes but was designed for a different era. Here's what a modern streaming API could (should?) look like. 】Web 流 API 在 JavaScript 运行时中已经无处不在，但它是为不同的时代而设计的。这是现代流 API 可能（应该？）的样子。
